title: Cover
description: Title slide with MegaRadio logo, tagline, and founder credit.

title: The Problem
description: Why global radio is fragmented, unreliable, and local-only today.

title: Opportunity
description: Market scope: 2.5B+ weekly radio listeners, 50k+ live streams, 200+ countries.

title: Solution
description: Universal player, global discovery, multilingual SEO in one platform.

title: Continuous Playback
description: HLS.js + Plyr engine, persistent player, multi-format streaming, stream proxy.

title: Discovery
description: Genres, regions, cities, search, favorites, comments, now-playing SSE.

title: Personalization & AI
description: Cloudflare + GPS geolocation, trend analysis, AI-powered recommendations.

title: 57 Languages
description: Hero stat: every page server-rendered in 57 languages.

title: SEO Infrastructure
description: Server rendering, sitemaps, hreflang, JSON-LD, junk rules, IndexNow.

title: Performance & Reliability
description: Multi-layer caching, MongoDB circuit breaker, OOM protection, SSR protection.

title: Architecture
description: Cloudflare edge, Express + TypeScript app tier, MongoDB Atlas data tier.

title: Mobile & Monetization
description: Apple IAP, Google Play billing, unified subscription matrix, ads, email.

title: Admin & Operations
description: SEO maintenance, logo and metadata backfill, IAP events, IndexNow monitor.

title: Why Now
description: Smart speakers, in-car streaming, and 5G make borderless radio practical.

title: Landscape
description: Where MegaRadio sits versus on-demand audio and legacy directories.

title: Traction
description: Stations indexed, languages, regions, monthly listeners (placeholders).

title: Business Model
description: MegaRadio Pro subscriptions plus geo-targeted advertising.

title: Roadmap
description: 12-month plan: deeper personalization, native mobile, broadcaster self-serve.

title: Team
description: Founder profile: Muhammed Fatih Geyik, full-stack engineering and growth.

title: The Ask
description: Round size and use-of-funds (placeholder fields for live conversations).

title: Closing
description: Thank-you slide with founder, web, and contact details.
